name: Low Cal Snickers Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray an 8-inch or 9-inch pie pan with Pam.
2. In a large bowl, combine ice milk and Cool Whip.
3. Blend in the remaining ingredients: sugarfree chocolate pudding, crunchy peanut butter, and grapenuts.
4. Freeze at least 2 hours.
5. Note: First time cutting, cut into 8 pieces and refreeze.
